title: Add short sound effects to all games

requirements.summary: Create a custom useSoundEffects hook that generates and plays three short sound effects using the Web Audio API: a soft click/tap sound on every interactive button press, a cheerful success chime on correct answers, and a low buzz/error sound on wrong answers
acceptanceCriteria: useSoundEffects hook is created at frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts
playClick() produces a short, soft tap sound
playSuccess() produces a short, cheerful success chime
playError() produces a short buzz/error sound
All sounds are generated programmatically via Web Audio API — no audio files required
Hook handles cases where AudioContext is not available gracefully (no crash)

file_operations.description: Create a custom React hook that uses the Web Audio API to generate three short sound effects programmatically. Implement playClick() to produce a soft tap sound (high-frequency short sine wave with quick decay), playSuccess() to produce a cheerful success chime (ascending frequency tones with pleasant decay), and playError() to produce a low buzz/error sound (low-frequency descending tone with abrupt decay). All sounds must be under 500ms duration. Include graceful error handling for environments where AudioContext is unavailable, returning no-op functions in that case. Use useCallback to memoize the play functions.

requirements.summary: Integrate sound effects into all Section A game pages: CardMatchingGame, MemoryTestGame, PatternMemoryGame, SequenceMemoryGame, SlidingPuzzleGame, StroopEffectGame, and SpeedTypingGame
acceptanceCriteria: CardMatchingGame plays click on card flip, success on match found, error on mismatch
MemoryTestGame plays click on input submission, success on correct recall, error on wrong recall
PatternMemoryGame plays click on cell toggle, success on correct pattern, error on incorrect pattern
SequenceMemoryGame plays click on sequence item tap, success on correct sequence, error on wrong sequence
SlidingPuzzleGame plays click on tile move, success on puzzle completion
StroopEffectGame plays click on color button, success on correct color selection, error on wrong color selection
SpeedTypingGame plays success on game completion with good accuracy, error on game over with low accuracy

file_operations.description: Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when a card is clicked (onCardClick callback). Call playSuccess() when a matching pair is found (inside the effect that detects matched cards). Call playError() when two cards do not match (inside the mismatch detection logic before flipping cards back).

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the user submits an answer (on form submission or button click). Call playSuccess() when the answer is correct (after successful recall validation). Call playError() when the answer is wrong or the game ends in failure.

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() on every cell toggle interaction in the input phase. Call playSuccess() when the user successfully reproduces the correct pattern. Call playError() when the submitted pattern is incorrect.

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the user taps a sequence item during the recall phase. Call playSuccess() when the user completes the sequence correctly. Call playError() when the user selects the wrong sequence item and the game ends.

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() on every tile move (inside the handleTileClick callback). Call playSuccess() when the puzzle is successfully completed (when isPuzzleComplete becomes true).

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the user clicks any color button. Call playSuccess() when the selected color is correct. Call playError() when the selected color is incorrect.

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playSuccess() when the game completes with good accuracy (e.g., accuracy >= 80%). Call playError() when the game ends with low accuracy (e.g., accuracy < 80%).

requirements.summary: Integrate sound effects into all Section B game pages: MissingLetterGame, WordScrambleGame, and FillInTheBlanksGame
acceptanceCriteria: MissingLetterGame plays click on submit/check button, success on correct letter, error on wrong letter
WordScrambleGame plays click on submit, success on correct unscramble, error on wrong guess
FillInTheBlanksGame plays click on submit/check, success on correct answer, error on wrong answer
Show Answer button in MissingLetterGame plays a neutral click sound (not success/error)

file_operations.description: Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the Check button is clicked. Call playSuccess() when the user's answer is correct. Call playError() when the answer is wrong. Also call playClick() (neutral) when the Show Answer button is clicked, without success or error sounds.

Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the user submits their guess (on form submission or button click). Call playSuccess() when the guess matches the correct word. Call playError() when the guess is incorrect.
Import and use the useSoundEffects hook. Call playClick() when the Check or Submit button is clicked. Call playSuccess() when the user's answer is correct. Call playError() when the answer is wrong.
